description: An FP&A manager is starting the annual budgeting process and needs to create the initial budget template for department heads.

nodes.task_description: Create a new budget version for the upcoming fiscal year in the planning tool.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully creates a new, blank budget for the next fiscal year.

nodes.task_description: Pre-populate the budget template with historical data from the previous year.

expected_outcome.value: Agent populates the new budget with last year's actuals as a baseline.

nodes.task_description: Distribute the budget templates to all department heads to begin their input.

expected_outcome.value: Agent sends notifications and links to the budget templates to the relevant managers.
